extraction.one_line_summary: VAN DER HOORN Taco won stage 3 by attacking solo with 500m to go while breakaway companions marked MOHORIČ Matej for bonus seconds
tactical_patterns: VAN DER HOORN exploited marking fixation on MOHORIČ's leader jersey, attacking opposite side with 500m remaining when rivals hesitated.
Breakaway structured cooperation with 2-minute turns early, then accelerated at 70km to go before individual turns in final 30km.
DE BIE positioned on MOHORIČ's wheel but failed to respond when VAN DER HOORN switched roadside, revealing positional tunnel vision cost.

rider_signals.VAN DER HOORN Taco: positive: showed superior tactical opportunism and finishing speed against WorldTour opposition in breakaway sprint finish
rider_signals.MOHORIČ Matej: neutral: marked for bonus seconds due to jersey position, limiting his breakaway sprint commitment despite being fastest rider
rider_signals.DE BIE Sean: negative: overcommitted to MOHORIČ's wheel and failed to track decisive move despite being positioned for sprint
